title: Cumulative floor-plan change set (changes_v##.json)
description: Source of truth for one proposal version. Cumulative: version N contains every change from versions 1..N. scripts/render_overlay.py renders it onto the base image as propose_v##.png.

version.description: Proposal version. Must match the file name (changes_v03.json -> 3).

base_image.description: Floor-plan image the boxes are measured against, relative to this file. Coordinates are pixels at that image's native resolution.

changes.description: All changes up to and including this version, oldest first.

id.description: Stable id, e.g. c01. Never reused.

rent_impact_per_week.description: Estimated AUD $/week uplift attributed to this change (from live comps).

boxes.description: Rectangles drawn on the base image for this change.

label.description: Text centred in the box. Use \n for forced line breaks.

rent.description: Weekly rent position after this version. Figures must trace to comps cited in propose_v##.md.
